overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night. The scene features neon signage including 'Pacifica Cabana', a burning vehicle wreckage, and futuristic architecture with heavy atmospheric effects and wet reflective surfaces. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban street with vehicle wreckage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked street toward a burning vehicle wreck with neon signs visible in the distance

entered.detail: wrecked vehicle engulfed in flames with orange fire glow reflecting on wet pavement
large red neon sign with palm tree graphic reading 'Pacifica Cabana'
yellow and black striped concrete barricades lining the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, with a burning car wreck in the center of the frame. The red neon glow of the 'Pacifica Cabana' sign illuminates the background through the downpour. The camera moves forward steadily, passing concrete barriers as rain creates reflective pools on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone between commercial signs and metro tower

events.description: passing the burning car wreckage which moves out of frame to the left
Pacifica Cabana sign exits left as the Metro tower building becomes the dominant focal point ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past the wreckage toward a tall building with an illuminated circular Metro sign

entered.detail: tall modern building with large circular orange neon logo near the top
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk near the Pacifica Cabana

segments.scene_description: Moving past the burning wreckage, the camera advances toward a towering building with a distinctive circular neon sign. The Pacifica Cabana sign drifts to the left and exits the frame while palm trees become visible along the sidewalk. The rain continues to fall heavily, creating a hazy atmosphere around the streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching elevated highway overpass with digital advertising

events.description: slight right turn as the path curves toward the overpass structure
moving under brighter artificial lighting from the overpass lamps

agents.ego_description: walking past the Metro building and curving right toward an elevated roadway with large digital billboards

entered.detail: curved elevated highway structure with support columns and overhead lighting
large curved array of illuminated digital advertisements on the overpass side

segments.scene_description: The Metro building moves to the left and begins to exit the frame as the camera curves right toward a massive elevated highway. A curved overpass structure with bright digital billboards comes into view ahead. The lighting shifts to a mix of street lamps and the glow from the overhead advertisements reflecting off the rain-slicked road.

scene_state.functional_zone: underneath elevated highway with digital billboards

events.description: fully entering the covered area beneath the overpass with reduced rain exposure

agents.ego_description: walking under the curved overpass with large digital advertisements overhead, moving deeper into the covered roadway

segments.scene_description: Now fully underneath the massive curved overpass, the camera moves through a semi-covered corridor lined with glowing digital billboards. The Metro building has passed out of view behind, while the overhead structure dominates the frame with its array of illuminated advertisements casting colored light onto the wet road below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that transitions from an open road with burning wreckage into a sheltered corridor beneath a massive highway. It begins by advancing past a flaming car wreck, with the red neon glow of the Pacifica Cabana sign illuminating the heavy downpour and reflective asphalt. As the camera moves forward, the Cabana sign drifts out of view to make way for palm trees and a towering building with a circular neon sign that looms through the hazy atmosphere. The scene then curves right, shifting the lighting from street lamps to the vibrant glow of digital billboards as a massive elevated overpass comes into view. Finally, the camera glides fully underneath the curved structure, moving through a semi-covered corridor where overhead advertisements cast vivid colored light onto the wet road below.
